mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Fannie M., Lula M., and Eddie W. Fishburn
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Fannie M., Lula M., and Eddie W. Fishburn Jennie H. Fishburn Wells, Guardian of her children Recorded in Ledger Book 3, page 149, in Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
